case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. EMILIANO AMADOR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $401.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT AMADOR, EMILIANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.50 - SERVED MAR-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AMADOR, EMILIANO
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MORGAN PRICKETT. FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AMADOR, EMILIANO
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT AMADOR, EMILIANO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMADOR, EMILIANO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MORGAN PRICKETT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVE WONG--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO COSTS, AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-23-2015 - JUDGMENT.
